calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michael Heath, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Alberta Tarusan, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Tom Ho or Anh Vu.
Default entered against defendant Tom Ho on November 27, 2007.
Default entered against defendant Anh Vu on February 5, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Alberta Tarusan, and against the Defaulted Defendants Tom Ho and Anh Vu as follows:

Damages/Principal - $157,601.00.
Costs - $135.00, for a total of $157,736.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Continued To Apr-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
